function.name: search_metadata
function.long_description: Searches document metadata such as filename, size, or last modified date to retrieve matching files.
example_user_queries: Search metadata where author equals "Alice Johnson".
Find documents with metadata field department set to finance.
Look up items where region is APAC in metadata.
Search metadata for status equal to archived.
Find records with metadata_field project and value vectorroute.
Show files whose metadata owner is platform-team.
Search for metadata field priority with value high.
Find documents where category equals compliance.
Look up metadata entries where source is crm.
Search metadata for tag set to onboarding.
